title: Un-forum 2026
text: Discussions and hands-on workshops on AI and open technology for the everyday people | Online and in person | 21st to 23rd March 2026

title: Canberra Un-forum
text: Discussions and hands-on workshops on AI and open technology for the everyday people | Skill Studio, Civic Center | 20th to 22nd December 2025

title: PyCon AU Chainference
text: We were an official sponsor. Join our watch parties for publicly available videos to continue the learning and community engagement.

title: Software Freedom Day
text: Celebrate open-source and digital freedom at Melbourne PC | Saturday, 20th Sept 2025.

title: auIGF Chainference
text: Debriefing sessions and continued engagement around internet governance topics. Dates TBC.

title: Everything Open Chainference
text: Fringe event Saturday after, Linux Victoria breakfast on 2nd morning, helped with CfS for 2023 & 2025.

title: DrupalSouth Community Day 2025
text: Open-source tech conference | 6 Nov 2025 in Canberra.

title: SXSW Sydney Chainference
text: Organizing local meetups for attendees to connect and follow up in their cities.

title: Attend a Gathering
text: Join an Un-forum session, a chainference alongside a major conference, or celebrate a global awareness day with the community. All skill levels, all backgrounds welcome.

title: Join a Sprint
text: Contribute to open community projects in a fortnightly sprint — using self-hosted, open tools. Bring your skills or come to learn. No burnout — just doing, together.

title: Connect Your Organisation
text: Bring your community group into the Electron Network. Join forces with like-minded orgs, share capacity, and amplify the causes you're already working on.

title: Support as an Enabler
text: As a policy maker, sponsor, or ecosystem partner — your support helps the open tech commons grow. Reach out to explore how we can work together.

title: Calendar
text: Stay updated with all upcoming events in the Electron Workshop ecosystem. Check our community calendar for workshops, meetups, and conferences.

title: Sprints
text: Fortnightly open work sessions for community and open projects. Learn skills, make friends, and contribute to something meaningful — together.

title: Chainference
text: Local follow-on events and watch parties chained around major conferences. Keep the learning and community engagement going after the main event.
